title: Luffy Breaks Through Krieg’s Arsenal
scene: On pages 3–6, the Baratie conflict focuses on Luffy, Sanji, Don Krieg, Gin, Zeff. Luffy keeps pushing Don Krieg backward, proving that Krieg’s weapons cannot fully stop him.

dialogue.speaker: Krieg Pirates
dialogue.text: He knocked the Don Down again!

dialogue.speaker: Krieg Pirates
dialogue.text: He should've been killed before he could even lay a finger on the don...! Our don's supposed to be invincible!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: that kid can fight, that's for sure...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He's definitely strong enough to match our Don...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: At this rate, the legend of our Don will come to an e...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: He... He took it out! Our don's most powerful weapon!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'll look forward to seeing how long you can keep away from this,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Unlike my earlier meals spears that you could afford to take 2 or 3 hits from, this spear's in a whole 'nother league.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What was that? Did it explode just now...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Touch this and you'll be blown to smitherens!

summary: This part keeps the Baratie battle centered on willpower, debt, hunger, and pride. The dialogue shows who still stands firm after Krieg’s violence and who is ready to break away from the restaurant’s old life.
